# LeetCode Solution Sync 🚀

This repository automatically syncs my accepted solutions from LeetCode.

## How it works
- The repository uses the `joshcai/leetcode-sync` GitHub Action.
- It runs daily at midnight UTC to check for new accepted submissions.
- Solutions are automatically committed and pushed to this repository.

## Setup
The sync is powered by GitHub Actions secrets:
- `LEETCODE_SESSION`: Session cookie from LeetCode.
- `LEETCODE_CSRF_TOKEN`: CSRF token from LeetCode.
